R

rawID - Variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLReference
The raw article title ID.
REFERENCE - Static variable in class org.docgene.model.XMLExtendedImage
Tags a reference extended image.
REGULAR - Static variable in interface org.docgene.model.FontType
The type for regular fonts (the default).
removeCurrentElement() - Method in class org.docgene.scripts.DocJScriptContext
Remove the current element.
removeH1Titles(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
Set if H1 titles must be skipped.
removeLastElement() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLChapter
Remove the last element.
removeNav(boolean) - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLRawHTMLArticle
Set if the article nav content must be removed.
resolve() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLDisambArticle
Resolve the Disambiguation article.
resolveTitles() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLArticle
Tag the titles as resolved.
resolveWidth() - Method in class org.docgene.model.XMLTableHeader
Resolve the width of the table columns.
